title: Golden Moroccan Chicken Tagine
description: A funky, crispy, and comforting Moroccan dish featuring cultured creme fraiche, steam, and ayurvedic tamasic friendly ingredients, cooked to perfection in a donabe vessel.
instructions: Preheat the donabe vessel over medium heat, adding the olive oil to the bottom of the pot.
Add the sliced onion to the pot, cooking until it is lightly browned and caramelized.
Add the minced garlic and grated ginger to the pot, cooking for an additional 1-2 minutes until fragrant.
Add the chicken thighs to the pot, browning on all sides until cooked through.
Add the smoked paprika, ground cumin, cayenne pepper, salt, and black pepper to the pot, stirring to combine.
Add the cultured creme fraiche to the pot, stirring to combine and bringing the mixture to a simmer.
Reduce the heat to low and cover the pot, allowing the tagine to steam and cook for an additional 20-25 minutes.
Serve the golden moroccan chicken tagine hot, garnished with fresh herbs and crusty bread on the side.
